summary: Backend smoke + primary UI flow verified for FairXI. Demo seed intact (Ben=MVP, share=$10). Create match, duplicate phone rejection (400), match full (400), invalid admin token (403), self-vote (400), vote-before-open (400), snake-draft team generation, and history all pass. Frontend home + create flow works end-to-end.
passed: GET /api/matches/{id} returns 10 players, share_per_player=10.0, admin_token not leaked
POST /api/matches creates match with admin_token + links
generate-teams distributes players via snake draft (Team1 total=8, Team2 total=6 for 6 mixed-rating players)
Vote before open-mvp -> 400; self-vote after open -> 400
Home UI loads with Ben MVP and $10 share visible; hero-create-btn navigates to /create

Create form (testids input-name, input-datetime, input-location, input-cost, input-max, submit-create) submits and navigates to /created/:matchId/:adminToken showing admin link, public link, WhatsApp share, MVP link
notes: Not exhaustively tested by T1: AdminPanel UI (team-select, pay toggle, mark-played, open-mvp buttons), Vote page UI verify-btn/vote flow, History page UI, waitlist message rendering. These were verified via backend but not clicked through in UI due to latency-sensitive scope.
